name: sudoku-game
description: Mobile-first Sudoku PWA with Android support

scripts.build: mkdir -p www && cp index.html app.js privacy.html favicon.svg icon-*.png manifest.json sw.js www/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r core platform platforms www/
scripts.dev: npm run build && python3 -m http.server 8000 --directory www
scripts.android:prepare: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build: npm run android:prepare && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run android:prepare && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:bundle: npm run android:prepare && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
